title: ToylandⓇ 47cm Double Barrel ShotGun With Sound Effects and Ejecting Shells
features: Get ready to take on the Wild West with this Double Barrel Shotgun!
With realistic gun sound effects and 2 ejecting shells, you will be transported into the Wild West.
Open shot gun to load shells, push two shells into the barrells, close shot gun and pull trigger to hear sounds, then re-open shotgun and watch as the shells automatically eject.
Set includes: double barrel shotgun with 2 sound functions & ejecting shells, badge and 4 play shells. Requires 2 x AA batteries (not included).
Not suitable for children undder the age of 3 years.
